reasoning: The control CCCS IA-2 focuses on identification and authentication for organizational users. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that authentication mechanisms are properly configured and secure. Using OIDC for authentication can provide a similar level of identity verification as MFA in cloud environments. Disabling service account token automounting helps prevent unauthorized access. Ensuring the API server has authentication enabled and uses RBAC for authorization aligns with enforcing strong access controls.
title: CCCS IA-2: Identification and Authentication (organizational Users)
